title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kinemon as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I smell blood... you... you're the actual killer, aren't ya?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Wano Arc begins in chaos!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 5 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
